narrative:
Lancaster City 6-C (precinct in Fairfield County) has 989 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
